headline: Nike’s Real Problem Isn’t Sales: It’s Relevance
summary: The real risk isn’t buying the wrong business; it’s missing when the right one starts to drift.

headline: Allbirds sells for $39M amid tough period for sneaker industry
summary: While Nike (NKE) reported a weak outlook amid its turnaround plan last week, shoemaker Allbirds was sold for $39 million after just shuttering all of its stores to avoid bankruptcy.Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre and Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma examine the recent trends and troubles hitting the sneaker market.

headline: Nike Can Appeal Court Ruling on Flyknit Patent Claims Against Lululemon — But Will It?
summary: Nike has 30 days to file an appeal of a judge's ruling that voided a jury verdict and fine in connection with a patent dispute against Lululemon.

raw.headline: Nike Can Appeal Court Ruling on Flyknit Patent Claims Against Lululemon — But Will It?
raw.summary: Nike has 30 days to file an appeal of a judge's ruling that voided a jury verdict and fine in connection with a patent dispute against Lululemon.

headline: Nike Stock Is Back to Where It Was More Than a Decade Ago and Everyone Is Talking About It. Is This a Generational Buying Opportunity?

headline: Veritiv Named to Fast Company's 2026 List of the World's Most Innovative Companies
summary: Veritiv Operating Company, a leader in innovative and sustainable specialty packaging, facility, and print solutions, today announced it was ranked No. 6 in the Design category on Fast Company's 2026 World's Most Innovative Companies list, recognizing organizations that are redefining industries through creativity, impact, and innovation.

headline: Jim Cramer on Home Depot: “I Regard It Now as One of the Most Problematic Positions in My Portfolio”
summary: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is among Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls as he covered Exxon, Lockheed, and others. When a caller inquired about the stock, Cramer commented: Okay, we were very disappointed in the action in Home Depot today. Finished down eight, it hit its 52-week low. The company yields almost 3%.
